title: BACAP Enhanced Discoveries Hardcore Addon
description:
A hardcore compatibility addon for
BlazeandCave's Advancement Pack Enhanced Discoveries
body:
## How to install
- Install latest Hardcore Version for you version of minecraft with the correct Enhanced Discoveries version
  - Do **NOT** rename the datapack
- Add it as an ordinary datapack **WITH** normal version of BACAPED, BACAP Hardcore Addon and BACAP
- Write /function bacaped:hc_install

## Main Datapack Page

Our main datapack [Enhanced Discoveries](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bacap-enhanced-discoveries) contains more than 280 new advancements and is compatible with any official BACAP Addons

## Credits
@rewerze - initial version of Hardcore Addon

If you have any questions, bugs, suggestions you can [create an issue on github](https://github.com/Komaru-cats/BACAP-Enhanced-Discoveries/issues) or [join our discord server](https://discord.gg/j9VKsyXPhz)
